name: Euroamerica Administradora General De Fondos SA - Fondo de Inversion EuroAmerica Property Fund
summary: Euroamerica Administradora General De Fondos SA - Fondo de Inversion EuroAmerica Property Fund invests in real estate assets. It is managed by Euroamerica Administradora General de Fondos SA. The fund aims to provide investors with returns through investments in a diversified portfolio of real estate properties.
